audio: NEW src/audio/bgm.js — class Bgm(bus): zero assets, lookahead scheduler (setInterval 25ms scheduling up to 0.12s ahead of ctx.currentTime — standard two-clocks pattern). ALLOCATION LAW AMENDMENT (documented in DESIGN.md v2 chapter + bgm.js header): WebAudio node creation (sfx + bgm) is an explicit BOUNDED EXEMPTION to the zero-alloc-per-frame law — it runs on the main thread (there is no 'interval thread'); budget <=60 short-lived nodes/sec, expensive allocations hoisted: ONE persistent noise AudioBuffer and reused PeriodicWaves created at init; the existing debug-overlay heap-delta line plus the Phase-3 profile pass verify GC stays negligible with BGM on. Own gain chain -> own DynamicsCompressor -> destination; AudioContext created/resumed via the same proven _onGesture path as sfx (iOS: resume() inside the exact START-click gesture; test on device). MUSIC: 132 BPM, swung 8ths, 4-bar loop in A major, 16-bar melody cycle |AM7|D9|F#m7|E7sus4->E7|. LAYERS (GainNodes; unlock = 1.5s ramp on EVT.TIER_UP — cosmetic-only law): L0 from GAME_START: triangle bass root-5th-octave bossa (gain .18) + sine kick 110->40Hz on beats 1,3; L1 at tier>=1: detuned-saw offbeat chord stabs through lowpass 1200Hz (gain .10) + noise hats (60ms highpassed bursts, 8ths); L2 at tier>=2: lead saw+lowpass-2400 pentatonic melody table (64 entries incl. rests, 30ms portamento, gain .12) + bandpass-noise shaker 16ths (gain .04). DUCKING: on EVT.GOAL master ramps to DUCK_GAIN 0.15 over 0.3s, full stop 1.2s later; GAME_RESET stop+rewind; title silent. MUTE: setMuted(b); single toggle ('M' via input.takeMuteToggle() + HUD #mute-button) -> bgm.setMuted+sfx.setMuted, persisted LS_MUTE_KEY, applied at boot. CPU ~0.2ms/tick scheduling. NEW SE (sfx.js, same _note/noise idioms, shares the persistent noise buffer): DASH whoosh on EVT.DASH — 0.3s highpassed noise with bandpass sweep 300->2400Hz + saw rise 180->420Hz (gain .14); DASH_READY soft two-note chime (gain .06); RARE sparkle on EVT.SCORE rare:true — 5-note ascending sine gliss (E6 pentatonic, 40ms apart) + 2.5kHz shimmer; GOAL fanfare on EVT.GOAL — FANFARE_NOTES extended to 8 (adds G6 A6 C7) over a sustained AM9 triangle pad 2.5s (gain .12); GAME_WIN becomes silent (fanfare already played at GOAL); WALL THUD free via terrain's EVT.BOUNCE -> existing _clonk; DOOR_HINT reuses a muted clonk variant.
tuning:
// Terrain (tuning.js unless noted)
STEP_CLIMB_K = 1.0            // floor step climbable when stepRealM <= K * trueRadiusM (FLOOR EDGES ONLY; authored walls always rigid)
WALL_RESTITUTION = 0.30
WALL_THICK_M = 0.12
TERRAIN_BUCKET_M = 4.0
BALL_Y_ZETA_DROP = 1.0        // critically damped when y-spring target moves DOWN (no under-floor dip)
Y_FLOOR_CLAMP_K = 0.98        // pos.y >= standSimY + radiusSim * K
// Camera / fog (indoor contract)
INTERIOR_CAM_MUL = 0.6        // CAM_DIST_K & CAM_HEIGHT_K factor inside interior zones
INTERIOR_FADE_S = 0.5
CAM_WALL_MARGIN_K = 0.3       // * radiusSim, boom clamp margin
FOG_FAR_MIN_M = 7.0           // real-meter floor on fog far (sim = /worldScale); 70 sim < loadRadius 96 at boot — assert kept
// Dash
DASH_RECHARGE_S = 6.0
DASH_ABSORB_GAIN = 0.04
DASH_IMPULSE_K = 7.0          // * radiusSim
DASH_DURATION_S = 0.6
DASH_CAP_MUL = 1.9
DASH_ACCEL_MUL = 1.6
DASH_FOV_BONUS = 8            // deg
// Goal / progress
GOAL_PROGRESS_RADIUS_M = 1.85 // bar hits 100% ~ statue absorbable (1.15/0.65 = 1.77)
CELEBRATE_S = 3.2
DOOR_HINT_FRAC = 0.15         // ball diameter within 15% of opening -> hint
// Score
SCORE_SIZE_BASE = 100;  SCORE_SIZE_POW = 1.4   // objScore = max(1, round(100 * sizeReal^1.4))
COMBO_SCORE_K = 0.10;  COMBO_SCORE_MAX_MUL = 3.0
RARE_SCORE_BONUS = 5000;  STATUE_SCORE = 10000
// Rank (clear time, s)
RANK_S_S = 240; RANK_A_S = 330; RANK_B_S = 450; RANK_C_S = 600  // else D
// Level streaming
LEVELSPAWN_BUDGET_PER_FRAME = 32
LEVEL_SWEEP_BUDGET = 64
LEVEL_MIN_ACTIVATE_SIM = 120
// Seed / persistence
DEFAULT_WORLD_SEED = 0x46414232            // rng.js
LS_BEST_KEY = 'fableKatamari.v2.best';  LS_MUTE_KEY = 'fableKatamari.muted'
// Deprecated through Phase 2: WIN_RADIUS_M (kept exported; scaleManager still imports until Stream B lands; deleted at integration)
// Level data invariants (level.js, validator-enforced): house max-achievable radius 0.67 < 0.70 (front door 1.4m); garden+house < 1.23 (gate 2.6m); max re-entry step 0.20 (genkan chain 0.45->0.25->0.10->0); pond depth 0.05 (never traps); furniture steps 0.30
